reviews.review_description: This game is an excellent way to hone your shooting skills, offering a range of levels that challenge your hand-eye coordination in diverse and engaging ways. Each level presents unique obstacles and scenarios, allowing you to test and improve your accuracy, timing, and reflexes across a variety of environments.

developer_response.body:
Hi and thanks for such a great review. 

     ... and thanks for finding a way to exploit the scoring system on the boss levels. I can't believe that got missed. Unfortunately it'll be getting fixed, one day. :0)

The CiderPressGamesDevon Team.
